concierge.title: Thursday — Momentum Day
notes: 🏆 RISE Challenge (Virginia) — Stability accepted! Complete the application
🎤 InnovateSouth deck — finish it, time the pitch (must be under 4 min), upload to Claude for evaluation & improvements
🚀 Push hardest today — Thursday is underrated
📅 Confirm any weekend commitments / Camille plans
💻 Reyla: demo-ready features for next week
🎷 Check WWOZ for weekend live music picks

private: 💌 A small gesture (flowers, note, her favorite wine) goes a long way
💬 Check in with Camille today — not just a quick text

blocks.label: Thursday — Push Hard
tips: Thursday is the most underrated day of the week
Two days left to make the week count — go

blocks.label: Reyla Demo Prep
tips: Build toward demo-ready. Beaux Box Realty is watching.
Clean UI, solid flow, no rough edges

blocks.label: Content / Media
tips: Publish something. Blog, social, Substack — anything
You're a media figure. Act like it.

blocks.label: Real Lunch
tips: Protein, vegetables, out of the chair
Walk to Magazine and back if nothing else

blocks.label: Call / Meeting Window
tips: Schedule external calls here, not in morning deep work
Stability SBIR, partners, Beaux Box if needed

blocks.label: WWOZ Check
tips: What's on this weekend? Plan something.
Crawfish, jazz, porch parties — check the calendar
